title: Relationship Manager, Automotive financing
description:
We're Hiring: Relationship Manager, Automotive financing / car loans / car financing 🚗

  • 📍 MRT- Newton (North-South Line + Downtown line)
  • Full-Time
  • Mon to Fri, 8.30 am to 5.30 am
  • Open to Fresh Graduates — Training Provided

About the Role
We’re looking for a Relationship Manager to grow our automotive financing portfolio by building strong dealer/customer relationships and structuring funding solutions that help clients move inventory and scale their business.



What you’ll do:

  • Grow a quality pipeline by marketing full suite of financing solutions (hire purchase, auto loans, floor stock, Vehicle financing, Inventory financing, Showroom floor, Demo inventory, working capital) to new and existing customers.
  • Plan and execute marketing strategies and campaigns to open new channels and stay competitive.
  • Build lasting relationships through regular outreach, client visits, and proactive account management.
  • Generate qualified prospects via events, referrals, digital outreach, and cross-selling with internal teams.
  • Assess credit applications, perform financial analysis, and prepare clear recommendations.
  • Ensure accurate, timely documentation and compliance for every transaction
  • Consistently meet growth metrics and quarterly business targets.

What We're Looking For:

  • Diploma or Degree; fresh graduates welcome (training provided).
  • 2+ years in financial lending or auto financing preferred; SME commercial lending exposure is an advantage.
  • Strong communication skills with an outgoing, customer-first mindset.
  • Comfortable with numbers, financial statements, and basic risk assessment.
  • Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple deals simultaneously.

What’s in it for you:

  • Structured onboarding, product training, and mentorship.
  • Clear career path to Senior RM/Team Lead based on performance.
  • Competitive base pay with performance incentives/commission.
  • Marketing support, tools, and quality lead flow.
  • Collaborative, fast-moving team culture with continuous learning.
  • Growth opportunities in the financial services sector
  • Build expertise in credit analysis and relationship management

Don't miss this opportunity to join a dynamic team and make your mark in the financial industry. Whether you're a fresh graduate ready to learn or an experienced professional seeking growth, we want to hear from you.

APPLY NOW - Attach your resume today to secure your spot in our next interview cycle. Take the first step toward an exciting career in financial services!

postedCompany.description:
Antares Management Services Pte. Ltd. is a comprehensive business solutions provider specializing in manpower recruitment and business process outsourcing (BPO). As a trusted partner for companies looking to scale operations efficiently and compliantly, we deliver tailored, end-to-end solutions that support every stage of business growth.

Our recruitment capabilities span permanent placements, executive search, contract staffing, and project-based deployments. 


In the BPO space, Antares supports critical back-office and operational functions such as payroll and statutory compliance, finance processing, customer service, and IT support, enabling clients to focus on their core competencies while we manage the rest.

At Antares, our mission is to empower businesses with the talent, tools, and operational excellence needed to thrive in a dynamic and competitive environment.
